mapper.select: select tag_id from sys_analytics_school_tag where deleted = 0 order by tag_id
mapper.update: update sys_analytics_school_tag set deleted = 1 where deleted = 0
update sys_analytics_school_tag set deleted = 1 where tag_id = #{tagId} and deleted = 0
mapper.insert: insert into sys_analytics_school_tag (tag_id, deleted) values (#{tagId}, 0) on duplicate key update deleted = 0
